positive: a movie in the romantic comedy genre

gt_titles: The People We Hate at the Wedding

_ps_our_actual_bq.sql:
SELECT title FROM mmqa.lizzy_caplan_text_data t
    WHERE AI.IF(t.title || " is a romantic comedy given their description: " || t.text,
      connection_id => 'us.connection', endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash')
result_titles: The People We Hate at the Wedding

_ps_our_actual_cascade.stage1_sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE mmqa.q3f_uncertain AS
    SELECT title, text
    FROM UNNEST(@titles) AS title WITH OFFSET pos
    JOIN UNNEST(@texts) AS text WITH OFFSET pos2 ON pos = pos2
_ps_our_actual_cascade.stage2_sql:
SELECT title FROM mmqa.q3f_uncertain
    WHERE AI.IF(title || " is a romantic comedy given their description: " || text,
      connection_id => 'us.connection', endpoint => 'gemini-2.5-flash')
result_titles: The People We Hate at the Wedding
